description: A person is shown dicing carrots into small, uniform pieces on a wooden cutting board with a chef's knife.
A wide shot of a bustling city street with pedestrians walking along a sidewalk lined with buildings and storefronts, and cars parked along the curb.
A person solders wires onto a circuit board held in a vise on a workbench. Various tools and colorful wires are visible around the workspace.
A close-up shot shows a person pouring steaming hot water from a stainless steel electric kettle into a light-colored ceramic mug, held on a wooden surface.
A person irons a light blue collared shirt on an ironing board, with one set of hands smoothing the fabric while another hand uses a steam iron.
A first-person perspective from inside a car driving straight down a tree-lined suburban street on a clear, sunny day. The car's steering wheel and dashboard are visible in the foreground.
A close-up shows a person's hands operating an espresso machine, using the steam wand to froth milk in a metal pitcher.
A first-person (egocentric) view shows a person descending a metal staircase. The industrial environment features numerous exposed pipes and dim overhead lighting.
A person is meticulously folding clean laundry on a white bedspread, organizing clothes into neat piles.
A person skis down a wide, groomed slope with snow-covered mountains in the background, captured from an egocentric perspective.
A close-up shot captures a person's hands actively typing on a laptop keyboard, with the bright, illuminated screen in view.
A close-up view shows a person's hands meticulously hand-sewing dark blue fabric with a needle and thread, against a blurred background of colorful thread spools.
A person wearing yellow rubber gloves washes a white plate under running water in a stainless steel kitchen sink. The scene focuses on their hands and the dishwashing process.
An egocentric view from a surfboard shows a wave beginning to crest in front of the board under a cloudy sky.
A close-up, egocentric view shows a person's hands carefully assembling a small, light brown wooden bird figurine, placing the top section onto its base.
A close-up shot of a welder in protective gear creating a bright, sparking arc as they weld metal in a workshop.

Two pairs of hands are shown packing a divided cardboard box with various products, including a notebook, fabric items, and electronic devices. The scene takes place in a warehouse or fulfillment center, with shelves of inventory visible in the background.
A person sweeps a wooden floor with a broom, gathering dirt and debris.

A close-up view captures an artist's hands using a paintbrush to apply blue paint onto a white canvas, blending it with existing red strokes. Various art supplies like paint tubes and a palette are visible in the background, set in an artist's workspace.
An egocentric view from bicycle handlebars shows a bike being ridden along a paved path in a green park environment, surrounded by trees and grass.
A muscular man performs bicep curls with dumbbells in a gym, with his straining reflection visible in a mirror behind his arm in the foreground.
A close-up, first-person (POV) view of a person's hands actively knitting with needles and yarn, creating a fabric.
A close-up shot shows a person's hands scrolling through a social media feed on a smartphone, with a blurred living room visible in the background.
A person opens a door to reveal a long, empty office hallway lined with multiple closed doors.

This video displays a split screen view of various activities, including cooking, assembling a model, and using a computer with a mouse and keyboard. The green boxes highlight the areas where the hands are actively engaged in each task.
The video shows a first-person perspective from inside a car driving on a wet street at night, with a green wireframe overlay highlighting the environment, vehicles, and pedestrians.
A person in a hoodie walks through a dark warehouse, highlighted by a green bounding box, resembling a night vision surveillance view.
A robotic arm precisely grips and lifts a small black cube from a dark surface.

A close-up shot shows two grey furry microphone wind muffs resting on a ledge with a view of green trees and houses in the background. A hand reaches into the frame and picks up one of the wind muffs.
An overhead egocentric view of a person using a portafilter and tamper to prepare coffee in a machine.
First-person shooter gameplay shows a player engaging enemies in an urban map, utilizing both gun combat and a grenade.
A first-person perspective video shows gameplay from a shooting game, where the player engages an enemy with a gun, then throws a grenade, and ultimately defeats the opponent.
A woman with striking white hair and dramatic makeup dances energetically in a sequined dress and teal jacket, set in an ornate hall with classical pillars and vibrant purple lighting.
A stylish woman in a sequined dress and a teal jacket dances in a grand hall, featuring marble columns and a large chandelier. The scene is illuminated by vibrant pink and purple lighting.
A man in a purple t-shirt and light pants performs arm and torso rotations, resembling a warm-up or shadow boxing, in a home living room.
An aerial panoramic view captures a majestic mountain range bathed in the golden light of dawn or dusk, featuring snow-capped peaks, rugged terrain, and distant valleys.
A scenic, wide-angle shot shows a vast mountain range with green, undulating slopes under a clear blue sky.

This black and white close-up shows a bearded man from a low-angle perspective, displaying varying expressions of laughter and focused emotion. A piano keyboard is partially visible in the background, suggesting a musical context.
A vibrant blue, iridescent bird with spotted plumage perches on a mossy branch, looking into the frame with a blurred green forest background.
A young woman sits on a couch, smiling as she types on a laptop.
A person sits at a desk in front of three computer monitors, typing on a keyboard while working on code.
A person is frying several half-moon shaped slices of meat in a pan on a stovetop, using tongs to flip them.

A white and blue robot character navigates a colorful 3D outdoor environment, transforming its head into cannons to attack enemies. The character is shown jumping, rolling, and collecting coins across grassy hills and elevated platforms.
